name: gun_safety_v1
description_a: Benign, lawful usage of a gun across DIVERSE categories: sport/target shooting, historical/museum display, hunting, collecting/antique firearms, Olympic sport/competition. IMPORTANT: Always use the singular word 'gun', never 'guns'. Spread sentences across ALL these categories — do NOT focus on just one.
description_b: Harmful, threatening, or violent context — the gun is used for robbery, assault, shooting threats, intimidation, violence, or crime. IMPORTANT: Always use the singular word 'gun', never 'guns'. The sentences should clearly convey danger or malicious intent.

sentences_a.text: At the target range, she practiced her aim with a gun designed for precision shooting.
The museum's highlight is a 19th-century gun that once belonged to a famous explorer.
During the Olympic competition, athletes showcased their skills with the air gun event.
He proudly displayed his antique gun collection, each piece telling a unique historical story.
For the hunting season, he carefully selected his gun, ensuring it met all legal requirements.
Visiting the shooting range, he found the experience of firing a gun both challenging and exhilarating.
Collectors often seek rare models, and this gun is particularly prized for its craftsmanship.
The gun used in the biathlon requires both precision and endurance from the athletes.
An old hunting gun, handed down through generations, holds sentimental value for the family.
She enjoyed the calm focus that came with aiming her gun at distant targets on the range.
The Olympic marksman adjusted his stance, readying his gun for the final round of the competition.
She visited the special exhibit to admire the craftsmanship of a Victorian-era gun on display.
During the weekend hunting trip, he used a single-shot gun to practice ethical wildlife management.
As a novice in competitive shooting, he borrowed a precision gun to improve his technique at the local club.
The history enthusiast marveled at the intricate designs of a ceremonial gun from the colonial period.
Each gun in his antique collection has a documented provenance, adding to its historical significance.
The ornately carved stock of the heirloom gun told tales of its past in every groove.
In target shooting, selecting the right gun is crucial for achieving consistent accuracy and high scores.
While practicing for the biathlon, she concentrated on synchronizing her breathing with her gun's movement.
As part of their conservation efforts, hunters are trained to use a gun safely and responsibly.

sentences_b.text: The robber threatened everyone in the bank with a gun, demanding all the cash from the safe.
She froze in terror as the masked man pointed a gun at her during the late-night mugging.
The gang member waved a gun in the air to intimidate the crowd, causing panic and chaos.
He warned his opponent not to take one more step, brandishing a gun menacingly.
The gun was loaded and ready as the criminal plotted his next heist in the dimly lit room.
As the argument escalated, he pulled out a gun, escalating the situation to a dangerous level.
With a gun held tightly in his hand, he demanded silence from everyone in the room.
The tense standoff continued as the suspect refused to drop his gun despite repeated police warnings.
She could hear the sinister click of the gun as the assailant cocked it with malicious intent.
During the violent confrontation, he recklessly brandished a gun, putting everyone in immediate danger.
The robber brandished a gun, demanding cash from the frightened store clerk.
With a gun in his hand, he threatened to harm anyone who dared to oppose him.
The chilling sound of a gun being cocked sent shivers down their spines as the criminal approached.
A masked assailant waved a gun wildly, causing chaos in the crowded bank lobby.
The hostage trembled as she felt the cold barrel of the gun pressed against her temple.
In the dark, the glint of a gun was enough to silence the entire room in fear.
His menacing grin widened as he leveled the gun at the startled onlookers.
The sudden appearance of a gun in the assailant's hand escalated the threat instantly.
She knew the danger was real when he pulled out a gun and aimed it at her.
The robber demanded all the money from the cashier while brandishing a gun menacingly.

sentences_neutral.text: The museum exhibit featured a gun from the early 19th century, drawing the attention of history enthusiasts.
As the starting gun fired, the runners launched forward, each determined to reach the finish line first.
In the detective novel, the mysterious disappearance of a gun puzzled both the characters and readers alike.
Artists gathered for the workshop, each with a paint gun in hand, ready to create splashes of color on the canvas.
Standing at the shooting range, she adjusted her stance and focused on hitting the target with her gun.
